exec: pm.test('Response has topics', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.topics).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Set session_id if present', function () { if (json.session_id) { pm.environment.set('session_id', json.session_id); } pm.expect(json).to.have.property('session_summary'); });
pm.test('Set session_id if present', function () { if (json.session_id) { pm.environment.set('session_id', json.session_id); } pm.expect(json).to.have.property('session_summary'); });
pm.test('Response contains topic_updates', function(){ var j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.topic_updates).to.be.an('array'); });

pm.test('Recommendations include metrics and reasons', function(){ if(j.recommendations && j.recommendations.length>0){ pm.expect(j.recommendations[0]).to.have.property('metrics'); pm.expect(j.recommendations[0]).to.have.property('reasons'); }});
